purpose: Machine-readable index for ML and LLM-adjacent custom HIP kernel scaffolds.

evidence_policy.profiler_counter_rule: Do not claim Nsight or hardware-counter evidence unless recorded with hardware and build metadata.

tasks.baseline: multiple simple RDNA3mW update stages with a materialized update buffer
tasks.optimized: single fused RDNA3mW update with float4 vector path and scalar fallback

tasks.baseline: separate RoPE rotation plus K-cache and V-cache store kernels
tasks.optimized: fused RoPE and KV-cache write for a contiguous non-paged cache layout

tasks.baseline: one thread per token scans experts and atomically scatters top-2 routes
tasks.optimized: one block per token performs local top-2 merge before two atomic scatters
